faqs.heading: What are the benefits of subscribing to ReelSaga Premium?
faqs.subHeading: ReelSaga Premium gives you unlimited access to premium short dramas, ad-free content, and personalized recommendations for a seamless viewing experience.

faqs.heading: What is included in the ReelSaga Premium subscription?
faqs.subHeading: It includes unlimited access to all premium content, early access to exclusive shows, and personalized recommendations based on your preferences.

faqs.heading: How does the 1-day trial work?
faqs.subHeading: Enjoy full access to premium content for 1 day. After the trial, the subscription will renew automatically, and payment will be deducted based on your selected plan (monthly or quarterly).

faqs.heading: Can I get a refund if I don't like it?
faqs.subHeading: ReelSaga does not offer refunds. However, if you're not satisfied, you can cancel your subscription at any time before the next payment cycle.

faqs.heading: How can I cancel my subscription for future billing?
faqs.subHeading: You can cancel your subscription anytime via in-app support or by contacting customer support.

faqs.heading: Can I gift my membership to someone else?
faqs.subHeading: No, memberships are tied to individual accounts and cannot be transferred.

faqs.heading: Will new content be added?
faqs.subHeading: Yes, we constantly update the library with fresh shows and episodes, so you'll never run out of content.

faqs.heading: What is the UPI autopay mandate?
faqs.subHeading: A ₹1 token amount is deducted for setting up the UPI autopay mandate. After the trial, the full subscription amount is deducted automatically based on your chosen plan.

faqs.heading: What are the subscription plans available?
faqs.subHeading: We offer monthly and quarterly plans. Choose your preferred plan after the 1-day free trial.

faqs.heading: How much does ReelSaga Premium cost?
faqs.subHeading: The trial costs ₹1 for the UPI setup. After the trial, the subscription fee will be deducted based on the chosen plan (monthly or quarterly).

faqs.heading: How can I pay for ReelSaga Premium?
faqs.subHeading: Payment is made via UPI autopay, simplifying recurring payments.

faqs.heading: How many videos are free on ReelSaga?
faqs.subHeading: You get full access to premium content during the 1-day trial. Afterward, a subscription is required.

faqs.heading: Can I watch ReelSaga on multiple devices?
faqs.subHeading: Yes, you can log in and enjoy ReelSaga on any compatible device.

faqs.heading: How do I cancel my trial?
faqs.subHeading: Trial can be cancelled at any time through the original payment app. Simply locate your active mandates to manage or terminate your trial.

paymentScreen.footerText: Token amount of upto ₹1 or less will be charged.
